name: 手机
reference_prompt: A black rectangular smartphone, 15cm high and 7cm wide, made of glass and metal, with a front-facing screen visible, no readable text on screen, clean and undamaged condition, product shot style.。源记录硬约束：数量:1；位置:龙崎右手持于胸前；运动政策:取出后点开屏幕然后缓慢推向桌边。源记录硬约束：数量:1；位置:田中健一手中近耳；运动政策:静止持耳

source_contract.motion_policy: 取出后点开屏幕然后缓慢推向桌边
